description_long: This is a matte black pickup truck with a boxy, utilitarian design and a covered cargo bed at the rear. The vehicle features four visible wheels with simple, light-colored rims and a slightly raised chassis, typical of pickup trucks. The front end is equipped with a rectangular grille and subtle headlight details, while the rear includes a tailgate and basic taillight elements. The cab appears to be a two-door configuration, with side mirrors extending from both front doors. The windows are dark and opaque, giving the truck a monolithic appearance. The overall styling is minimalistic, with no visible branding or decorative trim.
description: A matte black, boxy pickup truck with a covered cargo bed, simple wheels, and minimal detailing. The design is utilitarian and unbranded.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the grille, headlights, and front wheels, with the covered cargo bed extending behind the cab.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the two-door cab, side mirrors, and the full length of the covered cargo bed.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view displaying the tailgate, taillights, and the back wheels, with the cargo bed cover clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other side of the cab, wheels, and the length of the cargo bed.
